About.title: To the Children and Youth of Turkey!
About.description: The Great Leader Gazi Mustafa Kemal Atatürk led the Turkish nation's struggle for independence and became the founder of the Republic of Turkey.
About.mission: The aim of this project is to chronologically narrate Atatürk's life, filled with courage, vision, and self-sacrifice, and to inspire young people.
About.usageDescription: The aim of this project is to chronologically narrate Atatürk's life, filled with courage, vision, and self-sacrifice, and to inspire young people.

Contributors.title: Developers
Contributors.intro: The source code and data of the project are open to everyone. You can view the code on

Widget.title: Atatürk Quote Widget
Widget.description: Embed our lightweight iframe component to show inspiring Atatürk quotes on your own website.
Widget.previewFrameTitle: Preview of the Atatürk quote widget
Widget.cta: Add the quote widget to your site
Widget.embedTitle: Paste this snippet on your site
Widget.embedDescription: Place the container div and script tag wherever you want the widget to appear.

correctOrder.title: Arrange the given events in chronological order
correctOrder.wrongOrder: Wrong order. Correct cards have been locked. Try others.
correctOrder.shareText: Atatürk Event Ordering Game: I got it right in {{attempts}} tries! Score: {{score}} points. #AtaturkGame
correctOrder.duplicateError: The same event cannot be selected more than once.

ActionButtons.shareText: A Chronological History of Atatürk - Discover the life of Mustafa Kemal Atatürk through maps, visual and audio sources!
